description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, tag creation, and a weekly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu, build-osx, and build-windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest respectively). Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, generate a project with CMake, build, and test. The build-osx and build-windows jobs should also create installers and upload them as artifacts.
